article_meta.title: Legacy of Trauma: The Impact of American Indian Boarding Schools Across Generations Posted by Dr

reasoning: This article is a first-person essay/blog post by Dr. Lajimodiere, not a traditional news article. However, the author's own prose contains multiple clear bias instances that the model missed by returning an empty array. The author writes in her own voice: 'The boarding school era represented a deliberate policy of ethnocide and cultural genocide and human rights abuses. They rank somewhere between dungeons and death camps.' This is Opinion Presented as Fact / Sensationalism in the author's own prose. 'I call the US American Indian boarding school era America's best kept secret' is Opinion Presented as Fact. 'Of great hope is Sen. Elizabeth Warren's reintroduction of S. 1723' uses the subjective qualifier 'of great hope.' 'Let the truth telling begin' is advocacy language. The comparison 'somewhere between dungeons and death camps' is highly loaded Word Choice/Sensationalism. While this is an opinion/personal essay format (which complicates bias analysis), the model was asked to analyze it and returned [], missing several clear instances of author-level bias patterns.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: The model returned an empty array, so there are zero attribution rule violations. No quoted text was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: No items were flagged at all, so no false positives exist.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Multiple clear bias instances in the author's own prose were missed: 'deliberate policy of ethnocide and cultural genocide' (Opinion as Fact), 'They rank somewhere between dungeons and death camps' (Sensationalism/Word Choice), 'Of great hope is Sen. Elizabeth Warren's reintroduction' (Subjective Qualifying Adjective), 'America's best kept secret' (Opinion as Fact), 'Let the truth telling begin' (Advocacy/Spin). The model returned [] despite these significant instances.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: No bias types were applied since the output was empty. Cannot evaluate accuracy of labels that don't exist.
